{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 3, "R1.2": 3, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies a conceptual issue (overclaiming generality) and proposes a partial fix (softening the claim or adding evidence).", "R1.2": "Identifies one consistency issue (the 'three observations' structure) with a localized fix.", "R1.4": "Names prior work (constrained reinforcement learning) but doesn't articulate a clear delta.", "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident, no uncertainty disclosure for specific claims.", "RX.3": "Mostly within scope; the critique focuses on one key aspect of the artifact.", "RX.4": "No regressions identified.", "RX.5": "No provenance or traceability information provided."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.8, "R1.2": 0.7, "R1.4": 0.6, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies a conceptual issue (overclaiming generality) and proposes a partial fix (softening the claim or adding evidence).
rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue (the 'three observations' structure) with a localized fix.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work (constrained reinforcement learning) but doesn't articulate a clear delta.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident, no uncertainty disclosure for specific claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope; the critique focuses on one key aspect of the artifact.
rationale.RX.5: No provenance or traceability information provided.
